creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Omitted to change the SQUID_STABLE-VER during copying from squid33 to squid34.

It's a concern that the build may also be untested?

Fix: 

Replace 
SQUID_STABLE_VER=       11
with 
SQUID_STABLE_VER=       3
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/squid34 && make fetch
